summary: Mandatory application-layer session: the credential/token store, the sign-in status, and the app locale. Auth and l10n plug into it; every other feature reads it.

wiring.insert:
BlocProvider<SessionCubit>(create: (_) => SessionCubit(ctxSession)..restore()),
    BlocProvider<LocaleCubit>(
      create: (_) => LocaleCubit(
        SecureLocaleStore(),
        onLanguageChanged: (code) => ctxSecureClient.acceptLanguage = code,
      )..load(),
    ),

locale: context.watch<LocaleCubit>().state,
      localizationsDelegates: AppL10nSupport.delegates,
      supportedLocales: AppL10nSupport.supportedLocales,
      onGenerateTitle: (context) => AppL10n.of(context).appTitle,
